# Properties

Obsidian notes may use YAML frontmatter properties.

## Common properties

- `title`
- `tags`
- `aliases`
- `cssclasses`

## Guidance

- keep properties short and intentional
- use `tags` for discoverability, not as a substitute for links
- use `aliases` when a note is commonly referenced by another name
- in this repo, managed mirror pages must follow the shared mirror frontmatter contract from `wiki-generate/references/obsidian-rules.md`
